steps.t: The Easterling camp can be found at the South Undeep.
A fenced-in area can be found behind the Easterling camp at the South Undeep. You should peek into the fenced-in area to see if anything is amiss.
Adbert is at his post at the Undeep Watch. You should return to Adbert with news of the Nazgûl's presence in the Easterling camp, along with the briga…
